titulo: The Frankenstein problem is old hat—we must grapple with the intelligence substitution paradox of AI
resumo: In a world shaken by Anthropic’s Mythos, the cognitive caution we’d want AI creators to exercise appears to reside in their own creations—whose warnings are going unheeded. This differs from the Frankenstein problem.
